outreach_review.note: Outreach quality collapsed between batch_20260307 (60% pass) and cycles 2-3 (0% pass). Root cause: shift to government/school district vertical added legal context that inflated word counts to 110-152 words. Personalization also degraded - cluster/bulk emails have no recipient names. The dental batch (emails 1,2,4,5,9,10) is the best outreach the project has produced. B2G outreach may need a formally approved 150-word exception.

trend.note: Cycle 8 is the deepest audit yet (51 items vs 27 in cycle 7). Raw pass rate dropped because this is the first cycle to audit ALL outreach drafts including cycles 2-3, which have systemic word count violations. Content quality is holding steady - tweet/thread copy is clean. The gap is in outreach (word count + personalization collapse in later cycles) and community post closers (chatbot artifacts). 22 items remain BLOCKED pending human action (name research, word count cuts, placeholder fills).
